clue: Pressure wound essentially covered by bandage (6)
breakdown: D{U}RESS — wound essentially (middle letter) covered by dress (bandage)

hints.definition: The definition is at the start of the clue.
hints.indicator: 'Essentially' signals a middle letter; 'covered by' signals containment.
